/usr/bin/ar qc libcore.a CMakeFiles/core.dir/src/application.c.o CMakeFiles/core.dir/src/application_facade.c.o CMakeFiles/core.dir/src/controller/startup_command.c.o CMakeFiles/core.dir/src/model/user_proxy.c.o CMakeFiles/core.dir/src/model/role_proxy.c.o CMakeFiles/core.dir/src/model/enum/dept_enum.c.o CMakeFiles/core.dir/src/model/enum/role_enum.c.o CMakeFiles/core.dir/src/model/valueObject/user_vo.c.o CMakeFiles/core.dir/src/model/valueObject/role_vo.c.o CMakeFiles/core.dir/src/view/user_list_mediator.c.o CMakeFiles/core.dir/src/view/user_form_mediator.c.o CMakeFiles/core.dir/src/view/user_role_mediator.c.o CMakeFiles/core.dir/src/view/components/user_list.c.o CMakeFiles/core.dir/src/view/components/user_form.c.o CMakeFiles/core.dir/src/view/components/user_role.c.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libcore.a
